title: Edictum
description: Runtime governance library for AI agent tool calls. Deterministic YAML contracts enforce allow/deny/redact verdicts outside the LLM. Structured audit trail, human-in-the-loop approvals, PII redaction. 8 framework adapters. 55µs overhead. MIT licensed.

risk_maps: OWASP Top 10 Risks and Mitigations for LLM Apps 2025
